scripts.predev: find ../docs ../co-creation -name '*.md' | sed 's|^../||' > public/docs-list.json && echo 'ROOT_README.md' >> public/docs-list.json && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const docs = fs.readFileSync('public/docs-list.json', 'utf8').trim().split('\n'); fs.writeFileSync('public/docs-list.json', JSON.stringify(docs));"
scripts.prebuild: rm -rf public/docs public/co-creation public/ROOT_README.md && cp -rL ../docs public/docs && cp -rL ../co-creation public/co-creation && cp -f ../README.md public/ROOT_README.md && find public/docs public/co-creation -maxdepth 2 -name '*.md' | sed 's|public/||' > public/docs-list.json && echo 'ROOT_README.md' >> public/docs-list.json && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const docs = fs.readFileSync('public/docs-list.json', 'utf8').trim().split('\n').filter(Boolean); fs.writeFileSync('public/docs-list.json', JSON.stringify(docs));"
